MARISAMOD-CHARGE_UP_POWER.title: Charge-Up
MARISAMOD-CHARGE_UP_POWER.description: For every [blue]8[/blue] stacks of Charge-Up,double the damage of {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} next Attack.
MARISAMOD-CHARGE_UP_POWER.smartDescripti: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} next Attack will deal [blue]{Mult}[/blue] times damage.
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_POWER.title: Casket of Stars
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_POWER.descripti: Whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} gain [gold]Block[/gold], also gain a [gold]Spark[/gold] card.
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} gain [gold]Block[/gold], add a [gold]Spark[/gold] card to {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} hand.
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_PLUS_POWER.desc: Whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} gain [gold]Block[/gold], also gain an upgraded [gold]Spark[/gold] card.
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_PLUS_POWER.smar: Whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} gain [gold]Block[/gold], add an upgraded [gold]Spark[/gold] card to {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} hand.
MARISAMOD-MILLISECOND_PULSARS_POWER.desc: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
MARISAMOD-MILLISECOND_PULSARS_POWER.smar: {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
MARISAMOD-PULSE_MAGIC_POWER.title: Pulse Magic
MARISAMOD-PULSE_MAGIC_POWER.description: This turn, {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
MARISAMOD-PULSE_MAGIC_POWER.smartDescrip: This turn, {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
MARISAMOD-ENERGY_FLOW_POWER.title: Energy Flow
MARISAMOD-ENERGY_FLOW_POWER.description: Gain [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] at the end of {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} turn.
MARISAMOD-ENERGY_FLOW_POWER.smartDescrip: At the end of {OnPlayer:your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Charge-Up[/gold].
MARISAMOD-ESCAPE_VELOCITY_POWER.title: Escape Velocity
MARISAMOD-ESCAPE_VELOCITY_POWER.descript: If {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} end {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} turn with cards in [gold]Hand[/gold],draw that many cards (up to 2}) next turn.
MARISAMOD-ESCAPE_VELOCITY_POWER.smartDes: If {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} end {OnPlayer:Your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} turn with cards in [gold]Hand[/gold],draw that many cards (up to {Amount}}) next turn.
MARISAMOD-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.title: Event Horizon
MARISAMOD-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.descriptio: Once each turn,whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} active an [gold]Amplify[/gold] effect,{OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} may put an [gold]Attack[/gold] from [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.smartDescr: Up to {Amount} {Amount:plural:time|times}) each turn,whenever {OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} active an [gold]Amplify[/gold] effect,{OnPlayer:you|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]} may put an [gold]Attack[/gold] from [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to [gold]Hand[/gold].
